name: feature-flow
description: Bundle of 6 skills closing the loop proposal → implement → API docs → test plan → auto-test → stakeholder brief → deep-understanding handoff: impl-status (live HTML status tracker), api-contract-writer (caller-facing Markdown API contracts), test-case-writer (interactive HTML test plans), service-test-runner (test plan → pytest → per-TC results), feature-brief (non-technical one-pager for PO/QC), comprehension-coach (interactive teach-until-understood with checklist + quizzes).
